sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82010" key="peripterni/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπτερνίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandage for the heel</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fasc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.67</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
